title: Better PvP
description: Adds cool new weapons, enchantments and more to enhance your PvP experience !
body:
**This mod adds items, enchantments, potions and armor to enhance your PvP experience !**

_(i) The images below show how to craft or obtain each feature. To see them in action, check out [the gallery.](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-better-pvp/gallery)_
______________________________________________________________________________________________
# ✨ Features:

## Escape whistle:
Levitates the target in a beam of light, then teleports them 500 blocks away (random X or Z axis).

![Escape Whistle Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c06b1a510da0656442f430e19e10a73a17f3afdf.jpeg)

## Heal stick:
Restores the user to full health. Cooldown: 30 seconds (600 ticks).

![Heal Stick Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3714f2e70a79ffd7affe199065108690154653ae.jpeg)

## Scythe:
10% chance to destroy the off-hand item of the target on hit.

![Scythe Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb7d602b17f50a4ce3e43a65dfc831ab30adea16.jpeg)

## Slime Boots:
Grants the ability to double jump.

![Slime Boots Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e283112d8934264b5650f06a1bba4f76e84330.jpeg)

## Anonymous:
Makes the entity using it invisible (when applied on helmet).

Obtainable via loot tables (enchantment books).

![Anonymous Fishing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/773ef5056b762199598089f59a90719d3f97df2b.jpeg)

## Life Steal:
Grants hearts to the owner of the enchantment after a hit.

Available through villager trades (librarians).

![Lifesteal Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac776b56a0be2c8a8c1e1476048cbd1c253eb14f.jpeg)

## Marking (I - II):
Grants invisibility when applied to a helmet.

Available through villager trades (librarians).

![Marking Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22202e3dbd25a49f07af53f1b7d6cda33a3a2b68.jpeg)

## Water Walker:
Grants the ability to walk on water.

Available through villager trades (librarians).

![Water Walker Trade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ca351fa4edbff469276f4d5890074cd1d8645e1.jpeg)

## Dummy:
Player like entity only spawnable with an spawn egg used for testing purposes.

![Dummy image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27fcca7e3f740f90e69fa495515415ec661ae95b.jpeg)

## Potion Of Confused:
When applied, sets the target's health to 12 minus a random number (1-10) hearts.

![Confused Potion Brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da8327a05e8e25bffdd68a83796ae4655eb21123.jpeg)

## Potion Of Dizziness:
When applied, gives the target nausea and causes random sprinting and sneaking.

![Dizziness Potion Brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c40c8b6ac3dac2e7f8eacd850a4995c436250aa.jpeg)

## Potion Of Milk:
A splash potion that remove every effects from target.

![Milk Potion Brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11ba243d4fc2696eede1b011c50c89e77fae6129.jpeg)

# ℹ️ Info:
All potions in this mod can be brewed into splash or lingering versions

![Splash Potion Of Milk Brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cabfdb61f200999fe9f83563a23c589d9c324278.jpeg)
Adding gunpowder turns them into splash potions.

![Lingering Potion Of Confused Brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/505d5037d1bdeda8ea890257e77b24e413120429.jpeg)
Adding dragon's breath turns them into lingering potions.

# 💘 Support:
Support this mod by sharing and recommending it! Your feedback helps me create more content. Check out my other mods on my [profile page :)](https://modrinth.com/user/Polr)
